messages.content: what do you see on my screen
I see a young man with short dark hair and glasses. He is wearing a white t-shirt and appears to be indoors in front of a window with a white curtain. The lighting is dim.
what he is doing
He is adjusting his hair. The young man has both hands on either side of his head, with one hand touching his hair and the other near his ear.
can you open calculator

Jarvis
Hello Sir, how can I assist you now?
How Many files at a once we can give to free subscrotion of Cloud

The free subscription of Google Cloud allows you to upload up to 750 GB of data, but it doesn't specify a limit on the number of files, Sir. However, other cloud services like Google Drive have a limit of 1,500 to 3,000 files that can be uploaded or synced at once.
hello
Hello Sir, how can I help you today?
any files advance we can give to free subscription of cloud AI
The Google Cloud free subscription has no file upload size limit, but Google Drive has a 5TB limit per file and a 750GB daily upload limit, Sir.
not Google Cloud cloud AI
Cloud AI doesn't specify a file size limit for its free subscription, but it does have a 1GB model size limit and a 100MB file upload limit, Sir.

now in that at 21 14 81 52 and 21

now in that add 17912 and 11 and 2

no no no no no no no no no not that add 1 + 7 + 9 + 1 + 2 + 11 + 2
The sum of 1 + 7 + 9 + 1 + 2 + 11 + 2 is 33, Sir.
now at
You want to add 33 to the previous result of 408, Sir. The new total is 441.
